name: newsghuru-monorepo
description: Monorepo to run Newsghuru backend, admin dashboard, and users frontend concurrently

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix admin --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix users-english --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix users-tamil --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix admin && npm run build --prefix users-english && npm run build --prefix users-tamil
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:admin" "npm run start:users-english" "npm run start:users-tamil"
